posts.title: Simple REST API with Adonis JS
posts.summary: On the last ADB meetup, we have a conversation about what framework we usually use in creating a REST API. Then, Adonis.Js is being mentioned. I know Adonis but haven't got a chance to test it, so let's test it now!

posts.title: Parsing HTML with jsoup
posts.summary: Although a lot of my friends and colleagues use jsoup, i never had a chance to use it. It's my brain default to not choose Java as the language for parsing HTML.
